---
title: "Reveal Interaction"
---

## Overview
The `reveal` interaction generates a collapsible callout, ideal for hidden solutions, extra detail, or "clicked-to-reveal" content.

## YAML Usage
```yaml
interactions:
  - type: reveal
    variant: worked_solution
```

## Available Variants
- `worked_solution`: A collapsible block with the title "Click to expand".

## Parameters
- `type`: Must be `reveal`.
- `variant`: The name of the predefined variant.

## Generated Scaffold Example
```markdown
::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Click to expand
[Add hidden content here.]
:::
```
